temporal_description: In a dimly lit, moody interior, two men are the central focus in a medium close-up shot. The man on the left, who is larger and wearing a patterned blue short-sleeved shirt, looks intently at the man on the right. He holds a white object, possibly a cigarette, in his hand. The man on the right, dressed in a dark jacket, leans in close, engaged in a serious conversation. In the background, another person is partially visible, and a chalkboard with white writing can be seen on the left wall. The overall atmosphere is dark and intimate. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is present in the upper left corner of the frame. The camera remains static, maintaining a tight focus on the interaction between the two main subjects. A man speaks in a low, slightly agitated voice, his tone a mix of concern and exasperation. He asks, "Why are you throwing such a tantrum?" Another man replies in a calm, explanatory voice, as if trying to reason with him, "These Thais, they're almost frozen to death in Longgu Tan." The background is quiet, with no music or significant sound effects, placing all the focus on the tense conversation.
